name: Bailey's Antiques & Aloha Shirts
tagline: The world's largest collection of vintage aloha shirts — 15,000+ pieces in a Kapahulu warehouse that's a museum you can shop.
talkStory: Owner Dave Bailey started collecting aloha shirts in the 1970s and turned his obsession into the world's largest vintage aloha shirt collection -- over 15,000 pieces crammed floor to ceiling in a Kapahulu warehouse. Rare 1930s-50s rayon silks from makers like Shaheen and Kamehameha can fetch thousands. Barack Obama, Anthony Bourdain, and Japanese vintage collectors regularly shop here. The $5-$20 rack near the door has legitimate treasures for those willing to dig.
